summary: Completed testing of duplicate vulnerability detection feature (Iteration 20). All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend duplicate warning dialog verified working correctly - shows warning when creating duplicate vulnerability and allows user to cancel or confirm.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/vulnerabilidades/verificar-duplicado returns no duplicates for unique vulnerability
Backend: POST /api/vulnerabilidades/verificar-duplicado handles null/empty aplicaciones correctly
Backend: POST /api/vulnerabilidades/verificar-duplicado supports exclude_id parameter for editing
Backend: POST /api/import/excel skips duplicates and reports count in response
Backend: POST /api/import/excel response includes skipped_duplicates field
Backend: Specific scenario - 'Open SMTP relay de forma no autenticada' with BHD detected as duplicate
Frontend: Duplicate warning dialog appears when creating duplicate vulnerability
Frontend: Dialog shows list of existing duplicates with codigo, aplicaciones, institucion
Frontend: Dialog has 'Cancelar' button to cancel creation
Frontend: Dialog has 'Crear de todas formas' button to confirm creation despite warning
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_duplicate_detection.py (new test file for duplicate detection feature)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data including 'Open SMTP relay de forma no autenticada' with BHD institution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 tested duplicate vulnerability detection. Key findings: (1) POST /api/vulnerabilidades/verificar-duplicado endpoint works correctly - detects duplicates based on vulnerabilidad + aplicaciones + institucion using case-insensitive regex. (2) When aplicaciones is null/empty, the query looks for records with null/empty aplicaciones. (3) Excel import (POST /api/import/excel) automatically skips duplicates and reports count in response message and skipped_duplicates field. (4) Frontend shows 'Posible Duplicado Detectado' AlertDialog when user tries to create a duplicate vulnerability. (5) Dialog shows list of existing duplicates and allows user to cancel or confirm creation. (6) The specific test case 'Open SMTP relay de forma no autenticada' with BHD institution and null apps was verified to be detected as duplicate.

backend_duplicate_detection: Duplicate criteria: same vulnerabilidad + same aplicaciones + same institucion
Handles null/empty aplicaciones by looking for null/empty in DB
Returns has_duplicates boolean and duplicates array
Supports exclude_id parameter for editing scenarios
excel_import_duplicate_handling: Response message mentions 'Se omitieron X duplicados' when duplicates found
frontend_duplicate_warning: AlertDialog appears with title 'Posible Duplicado Detectado'
Shows list of existing duplicate vulnerabilities
Each duplicate shows: vulnerabilidad text, codigo, aplicaciones, institucion
Has 'Crear de todas formas' button (data-testid='confirm-duplicate-btn') to proceed
